description: Use exact source evidence before answering deterministic query counts
body: Use exact source evidence before answering deterministic query counts. Use when a read-only query, count, list, status, diff, or inspection request must be answered from repository or tool evidence. Do not use when the user asks to edit, fix, deploy, migrate, delete, insert, update, or alter state. Actions: identify the exact scope, run read-only search or inspection tools, cite the source artifact, and preserve the command or file evidence used for the answer. Validation signals include matching counts against tool output, source references, scope labels, and no modified working-tree files. Risk boundary: stop or ask for confirmation if the task changes from query to mutation, if evidence is stale, or if the answer would expose secrets or excessive output.
